opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints ache so deeply I can't sleep, and it moves from my knees to my wrists.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has been shifting around for the last couple of days and tonight my wrists are so bad I can't sleep — I want something to settle it down.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 5 days ago I started feeling wiped out and I had a rash for a bit, then the joint pain came on over the last two days
symptom_narrative.duration: the tiredness has been 5 days, the joint pain about 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, constant throbbing ache in the joints
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad tonight — I honestly can't sleep because of it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it started in my right knee, then moved to my left ankle, and tonight it's both my wrists
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it keeps moving from joint to joint and just doesn't let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — the paracetamol I took did nothing at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving the joints makes it much worse, especially trying to use my hands
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been exhausted, and I had a rash a few days ago that has faded now
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't open jars or bottles or make food because of my wrists, and I couldn't sleep at all tonight

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: the normal tablets, but they did nothing

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is finding it hard to manage tonight — can't open medication bottles or prepare food because of the wrist pain

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: a blotchy pink rash a few days ago that has now faded
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: rash has resolved and cannot be re-inspected; described from memory

objective_data_offered.value: my wrists and left ankle look a bit puffy
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-observation over video; degree of effusion cannot be confirmed remotely
